name: Star Alliance
description: Personal AI harness — skills + members (agents) + arsenal (model offload) installed as one unit into a project's .claude/.
_note: Bump harness_version on any release-worthy change. install.py reads this + the git short-SHA and stamps <project>/.claude/.harness-version.json so a project knows which snapshot it runs.

policy._note: Drives the proportional routing gate (guild-routing-gate.sh). The gate governs on TWO axes: stakes (reversibility/blast-radius) and size/novelty. Stakes ALWAYS wins over size — a one-line edit to a migration is small but high-stakes and must take the FULL gate + approval halt. Only a turn that is clearly-small AND clearly-low-stakes gets the LITE gate. Unknown → FULL (fail-safe). Edit this list, not the shell.
